monitoring: Real-time threat monitoring • 3D analytics • Proactive alerts
multimodal:
Multimodal AI: video, audio, OCR, connection graph. 
Results in 1-2 minutes.
vstavte-ss: Paste the link to TikTok / Instagram / YouTube
ai-media-w:
AI Media Watch analyzes video in 3 stages: 1) Extract key frames, audio and text (OCR). 
2) Detection of visual markers of casinos/pyramids (YOLO), speech transcription (Whisper), search for prohibited phrases (NLP). 
3) Providing a verdict and explaining the risk.
ezhednevno:
Every day, thousands of users fall for the tricks of scammers on social networks: fake casinos, financial pyramids, referral schemes. 
Our AI helps identify such threats before they cause harm.
investirui: “Invest 1000, get 10,000” is a classic Ponzi scheme.
ispolzuite: Use our AI to check your videos
kak-zashit: How to protect yourself from fraud?
obeshayut-: They promise easy winnings, but in reality they withdraw money.
zarabotok-: Earning money only by attracting new victims without a real product.
mozhno-vve: You can enter it with or without a protocol - https:// will be added automatically
ne-perekho:
Do not click on links in the description. 
Our AI Media Watch automatically flags such videos and sends them to a priority list for moderation.
reklama-i-: Advertising and calls for registration in online casinos through videos on TikTok, Instagram, YouTube.
video-s-us:
Videos with “successful players”, demonstration of winnings, links in the description. 
AI recognizes visual markers (roulette, cards, chips), as well as key phrases in the audio track.
korotkie-r:
Short videos with aggressive investment calls, screenshots of “earnings”, invitations to Telegram channels. 
AI analyzes text, subtitles and audio for the presence of pyramid marker phrases.
pomnite-vy:
Remember: high income without risk is impossible. 
Our AI calculates such videos based on speech patterns and visual style. 
Report suspicious videos.
video-obes: Videos promising “guaranteed income”, “passive income”, “investment at 50% per month”.
ne-verte-o:
Don't believe promises of easy money. 
Our AI recognizes these patterns and blocks the video even before it gains popularity.
roliki-s-n:
Videos with clips of a “rich life”, psychological triggers (“successful success”), calls to join a closed club. 
AI analyzes audio for aggressive intonations and prohibited phrases.
video-obes-0: Videos promising quick earnings on investments, cryptocurrency, forex, “secret schemes.”
ai-analizi: AI analyzes mentions of cryptocurrencies and tokens, and also checks links to dubious exchangers and wallets.
ne-doverya:
Do not trust projects that promise guaranteed returns. 
Study the whitepaper and the team's reputation.
video-rekl:
Videos advertising scam tokens, ICOs, “quick earnings” on cryptocurrencies. 
Use technical jargon to create the illusion of professionalism.
blogery-sk:
Bloggers covertly advertise referral programs, disguising them as “personal experience.” 
AI analyzes links in the description, comments, and also recognizes mentions of the “affiliate program”.
ne-perekho-0:
Do not click on suspicious referral links. 
Our system automatically checks all links from the video and flags them as fraudulent.
video-s-pr: Video with calls to register using referral links in casinos, binary options, crypto projects.
ai-vyyavly: AI identifies patterns: the promise of a stable high income, an emphasis on the urgency of joining, aggressive advertising on social networks.
esli-dokho:
If the income is too high and does not depend on the market, it is a scam. 
Check reviews and reputation.
klassiches:
The classic Ponzi scheme is paying off old investors at the expense of new ones. 
The videos are disguised as a “successful investment fund” with the promise of high interest rates.
kak-ai-med: How AI Media Watch detects scams, casinos and pyramid schemes on TikTok, Instagram and YouTube
kak-ai-med-0: How does AI Media Watch protect you?
ministerst: Ministry of Digital Development of the Republic of Kazakhstan
net-novost: No news for the selected filter
reiting-ug: Rating of threats by number of detected cases
net-zadach: There are no tasks for the selected filters
vy-uvereny: Are you sure you want to remove this task from the queue?
net-opasny:
There are no dangerous authors. 
Turn off the "Dangerous Only" filter to see everyone.
vy-ne-mozh: You can't demote your own role
kak-chasto: How often to run video collection (10–1440 min.)
kak-chasto-0: How often the queue checks for new videos (1–60 min.)
kak-chasto-1: How often to update news (10–1440 min.)
kolichestv-0: Number of videos from the platform:
skolko-vid: How many videos to collect from each active platform in one launch
zaderzhka-: Latency between requests to different platforms
oshibka-re: Registration error: server did not return data
oshibka-vk: Login error: server did not return data
parol-dolz: The password must be at least 6 characters
vse-nesokh: All unsaved data will be lost.
vy-uvereny-0: Are you sure you want to go out?
vvedite-na-0: Enter a name, AI will generate a structure with markers
